title: Supabase file upload returns [object Object]
symptom: When trying to access the signed URL generated from Supabase, the output is '[object Object]' instead of the expected URL string.
not_this_if: The signed URL is correctly logged as a string
The issue occurs outside of the file upload context
root_cause: The error occurs because the variable being logged or sent to OpenAI is a JavaScript object rather than a string URL. This typically happens when the wrong property of the object is accessed or when the object is implicitly converted to a string.
fix_steps: Change the file path in the upload action to use the component result instead of the local data of the file uploader.
Verify that the correct URL string is being passed to the OpenAI API.
agent_instruction: Update the file path in your upload action to use the component result.
